intended_use: The SCENARIA View system is indicated to acquire axial volumes of the whole body including the head. Images can be acquired in axial, helical, or dynamic modes. The SCENARIA View system can also be us
intended_use_full: The SCENARIA View system is indicated to acquire axial volumes of the whole body including the head. Images can be acquired in axial, helical, or dynamic modes. The SCENARIA View system can also be used for interventional needle guidance. Volume datasets acquired by a SCENARIA View system can be post-processed in the SCENARIA View system to provide additional information. Post-processing capabilities of the SCENARIA View software include multi-planar reconstruction (MPR), and volume rendering.
ground_truth: Manual scan range setting (for AutoPose); Clinical evaluation by certified radiological technologists and Japanese M.D. (for Body Still Shot)
other_metrics: AutoPose: all cases evaluated were able to reduce the number of steps compared with manual scan range setting; Body Still Shot: images were evaluated as obtaining sufficient quality
